title: knema andamanica subsp. nicobarica
intro: Knema andamanica subsp. nicobarica, also known as the Nicobar candle nut tree, is a plant species native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Knema andamanica subsp. nicobarica are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
